Scheduler Timeout Cycles

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x200
Size:
0x4
Source:
stream_regs.rdl

Description

Timeout threshold in clock cycles (global for all channels)

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:16] RSVD r 0x0 -
[15:0] TIMEOUT_CYCLES rw 0x3e8 -

Field Descriptions

RSVD

Reserved

TIMEOUT_CYCLES

Timeout cycles [15:0] - number of cycles before timeout
